---
title: "Helen Emma Yonge"
---

## Helen Emma Yonge

**Dates:** (24 October 1860-16 June 1941)

### Description

niece of CMY

### Biography

[Birth register; <i>Morning Post</i> 30 October 1860;
<i>Times</i> 19 June 1941].

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th  [1901]
- Letter from February 26, 1901
- Letter from Jan 29th [1901]
- Letter from Jan 15th 1901
- Letter from Oct 2d [1900]
- Letter from June 6th [1900]
- Letter from May 2 [1900]
- Letter from April 11 [1900]
- Letter from April 4th 1900[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from March 30th [1900]
- Letter from March 27 [1900]
- Letter from March 24 [1900]
- Letter from Feb 3 1900
- Letter from Sept 19 [1899]
- Letter from Sept 12  [1899?]
- Letter from Sept 7th [1899]
- Letter from Aug 29 [1899]
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 12 [1899]](../letters/3416_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- [To Charlotte Fortescue Yonge, July 20, 1899](../letters/3411_To_Charlotte_Fortescue_Yonge.html)
- [To Marianne Bigg Wither, August, 11[[footnote:1]] 1898.](../letters/3380_To_Marianne_Bigg_Wither.html)

*... and 31 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
